'''Beta Olikark''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]], at the tip of a galactic arm on the other side of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] from the [[Rayter sector/Legends|Rayter sector]]. Its natural stones had intricate patterns and were exported to other worlds for flooring.<ref name="Abduction">''[[The Abduction]]''</ref> On one occasion, a [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomat]] for the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], [[Kare Fontin]] was escorted to the planet from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] by New Republic agents.<ref name="Handbook">''[[Star Wars Gamemaster Handbook]]''</ref>
